card_description: Carl Wessterburg (meaning "Wessterburg = western castle") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Humpty Dumpty in Oakland*. Aging car mechanic in Oakland whose world collapses around him. Name note: A western castle that crumbles. The fall — Humpty Dumpty as the fragile American working man. First appears in *Humpty Dumpty in Oakland*.

reference.brief: Aging car mechanic in Oakland whose world collapses around him
reference.significance: The fall — Humpty Dumpty as the fragile American working man
